rationale: Gov't Code §2251.021 governs payment timing for governmental entity contracts. It is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts; no overlap or conflict exists.
quote: Except as otherwise provided by this section, a payment by a governmental entity under a contract executed on or after September 1, 1987, is overdue on the 31st day after the later of:
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this government contract payment-timing statute.
